summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Botanical Serendipity wedding guest dating app. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend has critical navigation issues affecting host workflow.

ui_bugs.issue: Host users redirected to /discover instead of /admin after registration/login due to hardcoded redirect in App.js line 57
Authentication state not maintained when navigating directly to /admin URL

integration_issues.issue: Automatic navigation fails - users must manually click Dashboard button

passed_tests: Manual navigation to admin dashboard via Dashboard button
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix App.js routing logic: Remove hardcoded redirect to /discover for authenticated users on line 57. Instead, check user.is_host and redirect hosts to /admin, guests to appropriate page based on profile completion status.
